title: Senior Financial Analyst - Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
company: Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners:
Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India South Asia Partners!
